title: juncus alpinus pygmaeus
intro: Juncus alpinus pygmaeus, also known as the Alpine Rush, is a type of small, aquatic plant that belongs to the Juncus genus. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Juncus alpinus pygmaeus include its ability to help reduce blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, and support kidney function. Traditionally, this plant has been prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal properties, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations.
